decision.summary: No live BTC position needs management; open a March 29 67k reach Yes position on the corrective rebound thesis.
decision.rationale: Latest transcript and summaries keep Beecthor macro-bearish, but for the immediate move he still allows a corrective rebound and even a short-squeeze into 67k-70k before looking for continuation lower toward 59k. Binance spot is 66443.78, so the nearest upside strike is 67k, and Polymarket prices `will-bitcoin-reach-67k-on-march-29` Yes at 52.85%, which sits in the preferred range and matches the near-term thesis better than the downside alternatives. Polymarket currently shows no live BTC positions to manage despite stale residuals in account_state. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.
